focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Performance & feedback topic for a Lead Web Designer. Discussing their approach to owning projects from start to finish without oversight could be beneficial.

transcript.question: Tell me about your week — the real version.
Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
What feels unclear or heavier than it should right now?
Does your current workload feel sustainable over the next few months?
How do you think your punctuality affects the team or project timelines?
How do you see your design work influencing the team's success?
Where do you find communication around your design work most challenging?
What's the one thing you want to focus on improving before we next meet?

notes: They are always late to work
